name: Hudson Taylor
title: Missionary to China
bio: British Protestant Christian missionary to China and founder of the China Inland Mission (now OMF International). He spent 51 years in China and is regarded as one of the most important missionaries of all time.
faith: Taylor pioneered a new approach to missions by adopting Chinese dress and customs, living by faith without soliciting funds, and opening inland China to the gospel. The CIM he founded became the largest mission agency in the world, eventually bringing over 800 missionaries to China.

sources.title: Hudson Taylor — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the pioneering missionary to inland China

sources.title: Hudson Taylor's Spiritual Secret
sources.note: By Dr. and Mrs. Howard Taylor. Classic biography of Taylor's faith-driven life

sources.title: OMF International
sources.note: The modern successor to the China Inland Mission Taylor founded

tagline: Trusted God alone to fund an entire mission to inland China
